atlas.put_in: a Minkowski sprinkling (coordinates only generate the order); all reads use the relation matrix
surprises: an oriented time and a finite-dimensional space are read off the abstract ORDER alone
atlas.persistence: rank<->time and the finite dimension are stable properties of the order
atlas.not_scripted_check: coordinates are discarded; time (rank), space (antichain), and dimension are read from the relation matrix and rank is checked against the hidden clock
atlas.claim_tier: measured (rank<->time, spatial spread, finite dimension) ; interpretive (time and space from order) ; analogy (spacetime from causal order)
floors: a fixed-dimension Minkowski sprinkling (the manifold generates the order)
the claim is time/dimension are RECOVERED from the order, not a manifold from nothing
